name: Bite-Size Crustless Quiches
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped red bell pepper
1/4 cup chopped green onions, tops included
2 ounces coarsely grated cheddar cheese (approximately 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease one tray of 24 mini-muffin cups (each measuring 1 3/4 x 1 inch).
3. In a small saucepan, melt butter over moderate heat. Add bell pepper and onions; sauté until soft, about 5 minutes. Remove the pan from the heat and let the mixture cool slightly.
4. In a medium-size bowl, combine eggs, milk, cheese, salt, and pepper. Stir in the bell pepper and onions.
5. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the mixture into each muffin cup (the mixture will fill 18 to 22 cups).
6. Bake until the centers are set, approximately 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Let the quiches cool for 1 minute. Using a knife, loosen them around the edges and remove from the cups.
8. Arrange on a platter and serve.
